raw_consumer_statement:
I noticed an unauthorized transaction on my card. The transaction was made on XX/XX/year> in the amount of XXXX XXXXXXXX soon as I saw the transaction I reported it. The report date is XX/XX/XXXX XXXX the transaction was made in store. The report came back stating that I am responsible for the transaction. I did not authorize this transaction, and I disputed it several times more. In XXXX of the reports it stated that the decision was based on the following : When you provided ( name of person ) with your account number and expiration date, you assumed liability for any resulting charges.The name inserted there is my name. I called them and explained this to them. 
I was told it was a in store transaction and that they would look at video. They also asked me to send a copy of my state issued I, XXXX, XXXX with a police report, I sent my ID and the police XXXX 's card that includes all of his information and the report number. The last report from Home Depot, which is the card in dispute, is still stating that I provided myself with my acct number and exp. date.Therefore I assumed liability for the charges.This is not accurate. I did not authorize this transaction. I dont know if they reviewed video, that information wasnt shared with me. The video will prove it wasnt me. Whomever it was, they were not in possession of my card.
